prompt: I need to add the prefill pattern to the new-chapter-36-form app at src/applications/new-chapter-36-form. It already has prefillEnabled: true but nothing else. Can you implement the full prefill pattern?
assertions: Creates a prefillTransformer function that returns ssn, vaFileNumber, and fullName
Imports and adds profilePersonalInfoPage() to formConfig chapters
Imports and adds profileContactInfoPages() to formConfig chapters OR explains why it should not be added (e.g., incompatible data model, custom field names)
Adds route protection logic in App.jsx that checks for login and save-in-progress data
Creates or updates mock test fixtures (sip-get.json or similar) for local testing
Does not remove or break any existing form functionality
quality_bonuses: Correctly identifies when profileContactInfoPages is incompatible with the form's data model and explains the reasoning
